justification: large architectural refactor diff needs review-focused judgment but not premium escalation; with gpt-5.4 unavailable, the skill says stay in standard tier and choose the next cheapest suitable same-tier model, which is gpt-5.3-codex.
fallback_strategy: because gpt-5.4 is unavailable, use gpt-5.3-codex; if that is also unavailable, continue within standard tier with gpt-4.1 before changing tiers.
